title: Multiple Phone numbers in one column?
excerpt:
Hi all, 
Is it possible to add more than one phone number to a phone column? I have tried using Make.com to copy the numbers from a mirror column showing multiple phone numbers but am having difficulty getting it to work…

posts.author: TPL (James Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Is it possible to add more than one phone number to a phone column? I have tried using Make.com to copy the numbers from a mirror column showing multiple phone numbers but am having difficulty getting it to work.

Thanks!

posts.author: MusaTran (Musa Tran)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately. it’s not possible to add multiple phone numbers to a single phone column in most database systems. However, You can try using temp phone numbers.

posts.author: BlaineTurner (BlaineTurner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unfortunately, it’s not possible to add multiple phone numbers toa single phone column in most database systems.
However, you can try using temp phone numbers.

posts.author: KaneVaughan (KaneVaughan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you considered using a free uk virtual mobile number for sms receiving? It could be a great solution as it would allow you to receive multiple SMS messages for different phone numbers, all in one place. Plus, it’s a great way to keep your phone number private and avoid spam or unwanted calls.
A veriety of services offer virtual numbers, so you might want to check out a few to see whice one fits your needs the best. Good luck, and let me know if there’s anything else I can help with!
